  "reasoning": "We're bleeding teachers faster than we can replace them. A funding boost without a plan will just waste money. But we need to act fast: teacher incentives, resource reallocation, and hiring high-leverage staff – those are the interventions that can unlock a new capability, not just patch the old one. I'm not convinced by the other options.",
